summary: Iteration 57: Testing new features - (1) 'Crea OdA from RdP' button on accepted RdPs pre-fills OdA form, (2) Certificate linking UI for arrivals with AI OCR extraction. Both features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: When creating OdA from RdP, fornitore dropdown shows 'Seleziona fornitore...' instead of the pre-filled fornitore name if the fornitore_id from RdP doesn't exist in the fornitori anagrafica list
ui_bugs.note: This is expected behavior - the Combobox uses fornitore_id for matching which may not exist in fornitori list if supplier was manually entered. fornitore_nome IS set in the form state.

feature_1_crea_oda_from_rdp.description: When RdP status is 'accettata', a 'Crea OdA' button appears and pre-fills OdA form

tests.button_appears_on_accepted_rdp: PASS - 'Crea OdA' button visible only on RdPs with stato='accettata'
tests.line_items_prefilled: PASS - All righe from RdP (Travi IPE 100, Bulloni M12, Piastre 10mm) pre-filled with descrizione, quantita, unita_misura
tests.richiede_cert_31_prefilled: PASS - Cert 3.1 checkboxes correctly marked for materials that required it in RdP
tests.prezzo_unitario_zero: PASS - All price fields default to 0 (user needs to fill)
tests.note_contains_rdp_reference: PASS - Note field pre-filled with 'Rif. RdP: rdp_ca08c6ec06'
tests.toast_notification: PASS - Toast message 'OdA pre-compilato dalla RdP - aggiungi i prezzi e invia!' displayed

feature_2_certificate_linking.description: Certificate linking dialog opens from 'Certificati' button on arrivals with materials requiring 3.1

tests.certificati_button_appears: PASS - 'Certificati' button visible on arrival with materials having richiede_cert_31=true
tests.dialog_title: PASS - Dialog titled 'Collega Certificati ai Materiali'
tests.ddt_reference_shown: PASS - DDT reference 'DDT-2024-1234' displayed in dialog
tests.materials_table_displayed: PASS - Table shows materials with columns: Materiale, Q.tà, Colata, Azioni
tests.cert_31_badges: PASS - '3.1' badges shown next to materials requiring certificates
tests.non_collegato_text: PASS - Materials not linked show 'Non collegato' in red
tests.carica_cert_button: PASS - 'Carica Cert.' button available for uploading certificates
tests.non_cert_materials_dash: PASS - Materials not requiring cert 3.1 (Piastre 10mm) show '-' instead of upload option
tests.ai_ocr_info_text: PASS - AI OCR explanation text present about automatic extraction of numero colata, qualita, fornitore

backend_api_tests.rdp_creation: PASS - POST /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/richieste with righe array works
backend_api_tests.rdp_status_update: PASS - PUT to update RdP status (inviata -> ricevuta -> accettata) works
backend_api_tests.arrivo_creation: PASS - POST /api/commesse/{id}/approvvigionamento/arrivi with materiali array and richiede_cert_31 works
backend_api_tests.arrivo_materiali_cert_fields: PASS - Each materiale has certificato_doc_id, numero_colata, qualita_materiale fields

action_items: Minor: Consider adding display of fornitore_nome in OdA form even when fornitore_id doesn't match anagrafica (for manual entries)
critical_code_review_comments: handleCreateOdaFromRdp (line 237) correctly pre-fills all RdP line items with prezzo_unitario=0
Certificate linking dialog (line 1355) correctly shows materials table with upload buttons only for richiede_cert_31=true materials
handleCertificateUpload (line 440) uploads certificate, calls AI parse endpoint, then links to material via PUT endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa com_19ac75484426 with RdP (3 righe) and Arrivo (3 materiali with richiede_cert_31) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested and working: (1) 'Crea OdA' button appears on RdPs with stato='accettata' and pre-fills OdA form with line items from RdP (descrizione, quantita, um, richiede_cert_31) - prices default to 0 and note contains RdP reference. (2) 'Certificati' button on arrivals opens dialog showing materials requiring 3.1 certificates with 'Carica Cert.' upload buttons - materials already linked would show green 'Collegato' badge. AI OCR integration would extract numero_colata and qualita_materiale from uploaded PDFs.
